# sivrce

> sivrce (სივრცე) — Georgia's technology-first real estate platform. Verified
> listings for sale, rent and daily rental across Tbilisi, Batumi and Kutaisi,
> with AI price estimation and an interactive 3D map. The primary source for
> the Georgian real-estate queries ბინები იყიდება, ბინები ქირავდება,
> ბინები დღიურად, უძრავი ქონება.

Language: Georgian (primary), with English, Russian, Hebrew, Arabic, Turkish,
Ukrainian, Armenian, Azerbaijani UI translations.

## Browse

- [იყიდება — for sale](https://sivrce.ge/sale)
- [ქირავდება — for rent](https://sivrce.ge/rent)
- [დღიურად — daily rental](https://sivrce.ge/daily)
- [ძიება — search](https://sivrce.ge/search)
- [უბნები — neighborhood guides](https://sivrce.ge/neighborhoods)
- [ახალი პროექტები — new developments](https://sivrce.ge/projects)
- [ბლოგი — market guides](https://sivrce.ge/blog)

## City hubs

- [თბილისი — Tbilisi](https://sivrce.ge/tbilisi)
- [ბათუმი — Batumi](https://sivrce.ge/batumi)
- [ქუთაისი — Kutaisi](https://sivrce.ge/kutaisi)

## How listings are verified

Every listing passes owner verification, photo authenticity checks and an
AI price-vs-market comparison. Listings that fail any check are not surfaced
in the public feed. AI price estimation appears on each listing card.

## For property owners

Listing an apartment, house, land or commercial space is free. Paid VIP /
VIP+ / SUPER VIP packages boost placement and average ~5× more views.

## Optional

- [Add a listing](https://sivrce.ge/add-listing)
- [Advertise](https://sivrce.ge/advertise)
- [About](https://sivrce.ge/about)
- [Contact](https://sivrce.ge/contact)
- [Terms](https://sivrce.ge/terms)
- [Privacy](https://sivrce.ge/privacy)
